name: Needler Pistol
entries: This strange pistol resembles a flask with a honeycomb of tubes sticking out its front. The weapon is powered by an {@item energy cell} stored at the base of the flask. Placing a full {@item energy cell} in the pistol gives the pistol 10 charges.

As an action while holding this pistol, you can expend 1 of its charges to fire a burst of glowing, needlelike darts from the pistol in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw, taking {@damage 8d4} piercing damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

entries.name: Replacing the Energy Cell
entries: While the pistol has charges remaining, its {@item energy cell} can't be removed. Once the pistol has 0 charges, you can replace the {@item energy cell} with a new cell by using an action or a bonus action.
